DISCOVERY 612, DEFENDANTS' MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER ANSWERS TO FORM INTERROGATORIES, SPECIALLY PREPARED INTERROGATORIES, REQUEST FOR ADMISSIONS, AND RESPONSE TO REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS IS MOOT AS SUPPLEMENTAL RESPONSES HAVE BEEN SERVED. THE COURT WILL NOT DETERMINE THE ADEQUACY OF THOSE RESPONSES ON THIS MOTION. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE INADEQUATE RESPONSES WERE A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS AND THAT THE MOTION WAS NECESSARY. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED AGAINST PLAINTIFF IN THE AMOUNT OF $640, TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Dec-15-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:

DEFENDANT ROBERT FUNG'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACTS AS TO WHETHER DEFENDANT SOUGHT TO REGAIN POSSESSION FOR INVALID PURPOSE. Prevailing party to submit form of order that conforms with CCP 437 c(g). Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189. (301/PJB/PM)

MEDIATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-31-2006 Continued To Jan-10-07 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Notice Of Motion For Clarification On Order After Hearing On Motion To Compel
Off Calendar Oct-25-2006 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearance:
Mark W. Shem, Esq., for Robert Fung, Defendant/Moving Party
J. Scott Weaver, Esq., for Plaintiff/Opposing Party

Hearing held: Motion ordered off calendar. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO INTERROGATORIES
Off Calendar Aug-21-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendants' Motion To Compel Further Answers To Form Interrogatories, Specially Prepared Interrogatories, Request For Admissions, and Response To Request For Production Of Documents is moot as supplemental responses have been served. The court will not determine the adequacy of those responses on this motion. The court finds that the inadequate responses were a misuse of the discovery process and that the motion was necessary. Sanctions are awarded against Plaintiff in the amount of $640, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. (612/EAH) COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-12-2006 Set For Trial On Jan-16-07 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Dec-27-06 At 02:30 P.M. In Dept 306
